name: Diplomatic Disunity
description: Efforts are underway to bring in societies left out of major decisions or who have bad blood with larger factions. A conference to bridge those gaps may improve intergalactic relations - if violent tempers and colliding ships don't ruin things first!
rules:
-- Unique Borg, Ferengi Alliance, and Section 31 Faction Missions are available during the event. Open the Event to access them.
-- Using Yuta, any version of Gav, Lumas, Mot, or Explorers will provide a bonus to Event Faction Missions.
-- Every Event Faction Mission you succeed at earns you Event Victory Points. Collect Victory Points to unlock Event Threshold Rewards.
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Crew Bonus: Yuta, Gav, Lumas, Mot, Explorers
rewards_teaser: Reach Rank 1 by gaining Victory Points from Event Missions!

featured_crew.name: Gonald
featured_crew.flavor: Madame Gonald is a renowned restaurant critic whom Migleemo hoped to impress with his skills. However, things weren't quite so simple.

action.name: Oh, You're Going To Hate Flavor Prison

featured_crew.name: Lumas
featured_crew.flavor: Lumas and the other Caatati who survived the assimilation ended up on Voyager, where they were hostile to Seven of Nine until she helped them.

action.name: I Lost Everything. My Family, My Home.

featured_crew.name: Mot
featured_crew.flavor: A Bolian barber who works aboard the USS Enterprise. His tactical advice has come in handy more than once.

rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Voyage Revival
rewards.flavor: Use to instantly revive a failed Voyage.

rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

rewards.name: Skill
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine

rewards.name: ISM
rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine

rewards.name: ISM
rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.name: Dilithium
rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Gonald
rewards.flavor: Madame Gonald is a renowned restaurant critic whom Migleemo hoped to impress with his skills. However, things weren't quite so simple.

action.name: Oh, You're Going To Hate Flavor Prison

rewards.name: Mot
rewards.flavor: A Bolian barber who works aboard the USS Enterprise. His tactical advice has come in handy more than once.
